title: Trams4MC - MTR/NTE Addon
description: This resource pack is an addon for MTR. It adds several types of trams for Minecraft.
body:
# Resourcepack work with every MC version that have NTE 0.5.2 and MTR
### MTR and NTE are required (obviously)

## Now every tram has tail number. Just rename siding rail to the number and assign a route in dashboard 
![Tail number](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14c4a0023f11e288c1780747140c5db4e3400a6d_0.webp)
---
### This resourcepack adds serveral trams in Minecraft using JS render scripts 
## Tatra T6A5 
![T6A5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2baf5cbd3df8ab53e41aa0d4047eca780379e62e_0.webp)
- Correct door animation 
- Rotating Wheels
- Working route display
- (New!) working tail number.
---
- Анимация дверей
- Вращающиеся колеса
- Рабочий ЭМУ
- Рабочий бортовой номер 
## Tatra T6B5
![T6B5 without ads](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ce7a6fc2e68460d6e2822d19653951c7d2ee921_0.webp)
![T6B5 with adds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04dd29c4da834b22a5e1bab7c888a4494056885d_0.webp)
- Carriage shaking
- Rotating wheels
- Correct door animation
- Working route board
- Working windshiled wipers
- Option with random advertising
- (New!) working tail number.
---
- Покачивание вагона
- Анимация дверей
- Вращающиеся колеса
- Рабочий маршрутоуказатель
- Рабочие стеклоочистители
- Присутствует версия с наружной рекламой
- Рабочий бортовой номер  

## Tatra KT8D5
![KT8D5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f803fb2bca8ad79e90fd8b8796d63f4a7ab1a7ad_0.webp)

- Rotating wheels
- Rotating bogies 
- Correct door animation
- Working route display
- Working windshiled wipers
- (New!) working tail number.
---
- Анимация дверей
- Вращающиеся тележки
- Вращающиеся колеса
- Рабочий маршрутоуказатель
- Рабочие стеклоочистители
- Рабочий бортовой номер 

## 71-605/KTM 5M3
![71-605](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db693a403d8b8d8caf920b8e34f18a6476ae7c7f_0.webp)
- Carriage shaking
- Rotating wheels
- Correct door animation
- Working route board
- Working windshiled wiper
- (New!) working tail number.
---
- Анимация дверей
- Покачивание вагона
- Вращающиеся колеса
- Рабочий маршрутоуказатель
- Рабочий стеклоочиститель
- Рабочий бортовой номер 

T6A5 model by ArtVer
KT8/T6A5 sounds by DAMIRAP
